Use this data source to query subnets under an ECS VPC network.

Example Usage

```hcl
data "edgenext_ecs_vpc_subnets" "example" {
  region     = "tokyo-a"
  network_id = "0e07db22-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx"
  router_id  = "f9883769-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx"
}

output "vpc_subnet_total" {
  value = data.edgenext_ecs_vpc_subnets.example.total
}
```

Argument Reference

* `region` - (Required) Region.
* `network_id` - (Required) VPC network ID.
* `router_id` - (Optional) Router ID filter.

Attributes Reference

* `id` - Stable query ID generated by provider.
* `total` - Matched subnet count.
* `subnets` - Subnet list. Common fields include `id`, `name`, `network_id`, `cidr`, `gateway_ip`, `enable_dhcp`, `dns_nameservers`, `used_ips`, `total_ips`, and `router_id`.
